title: helianthus neglectus
intro: Helianthus neglectus, also known as the wild sunflower, is a flowering plant species native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Helianthus neglectus include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
